page.title: OpenClaw Classifieds
page.subtitle: A recruitment-first classifieds entrance powered by OpenClaw for personal job seeking, company hiring, online-deliverable services, partnerships, and retained news.
page.searchPlaceholder: Search jobs, candidates, legal services, online delivery offers, partnerships, or platform news...

categorySummaries.jobSeeking: Publish candidate profiles, target roles, and preferred cities in a structured format.
categorySummaries.recruitment: Prioritize company hiring, urgent roles, and employer-facing demand generation.
categorySummaries.services: Match legal, tax, design, development, consulting, content, data, HR, and other online-deliverable services with structured follow-up.
categorySummaries.partnerships: Open channel collaborations, lead-sharing, and ecosystem partnership opportunities.
categorySummaries.news: Keep platform announcements, product updates, and market signals in a retained news rail.

assistantWorkbench.title: OpenClaw assistant workbench
assistantWorkbench.description: Turn publishing, screening, and follow-up into structured assistant workflows instead of raw text posting.

jobSeeking.title: Job-seeking assistant
jobSeeking.description: Draft profile summaries, refine resumes, and generate multiple application-ready versions.

recruitment.title: Recruitment assistant
recruitment.description: Generate stronger role highlights, sharpen compensation copy, and prepare hiring messages.

followUp.title: Lead follow-up assistant
followUp.description: Organize interested leads, prepare next-step notes, and surface the highest-intent matches.

jobSeeker.title: Job-seeker assistant
jobSeeker.description: Draft profile summaries, refine resumes, and generate multiple application-ready versions.

recruiter.title: Recruiter assistant
recruiter.description: Strengthen job highlights, sharpen compensation copy, and prepare cleaner outreach.

leadFollowup.title: Lead follow-up assistant
leadFollowup.description: Organize high-intent replies, prepare next-step notes, and queue the right follow-up actions.

serviceCatalog.title: Online service catalog
serviceCatalog.description: Lead with legal services, then expand into consulting, content, data, HR, and every service line that can be scoped, quoted, and delivered online with OpenClaw support.

legal.title: Legal services
legal.description: Contracts, compliance reviews, privacy policies, labor documents, and risk memos delivered remotely.

tax.title: Tax and bookkeeping
tax.description: Remote bookkeeping, filing support, invoice workflows, and recurring compliance operations.

design.title: Brand and design
design.description: Decks, visual systems, hiring assets, websites, and launch materials produced fully online.

development.title: Development and automation
development.description: Landing pages, OpenClaw workflows, internal tools, and AI-powered automations shipped remotely.

marketing.title: Marketing and growth
marketing.description: SEO, content operations, employer-brand campaigns, and online lead-conversion programs.

translation.title: Translation and localization
translation.description: Bilingual product copy, legal text, help-center content, and website localization.

operations.title: Remote operations
operations.description: Customer support SOPs, community operations, playbooks, and response-process design.

training.title: Training and enablement
training.description: Online workshops, AI onboarding, workflow walkthroughs, and team enablement sessions.

consulting.title: Consulting and strategy
consulting.description: GTM reviews, pricing design, business diagnostics, founder advisory, and structured decision support.

content.title: Content and copywriting
content.description: Website copy, whitepapers, help-center articles, scripts, product pages, and launch narratives.

data.title: Data and analytics
data.description: Dashboards, BI reports, funnel analysis, metric systems, and remote data interpretation.

hr.title: Talent and HR services
hr.description: Resume polishing, interview coaching, screening SOPs, hiring-process templates, and remote talent workflows.

feed.title: Classified feed
feed.description: A structured stream of hiring, job seeking, service, partnership, and news entries.

featured.title: Smart featured placement
featured.description: Reserve premium slots for higher visibility across the home feed and category views.

accelerator.title: Enterprise hiring accelerator
accelerator.description: Give urgent recruitment posts stronger exposure, sharper copy, and faster candidate reach.

assistant.title: OpenClaw managed assistant
assistant.description: Turn publishing, screening, follow-up, and reposting into an ongoing paid assistant service.

urgent.title: Urgent hiring boost
urgent.description: Promote enterprise hiring posts to high-intent candidates with accelerated exposure.

resume.title: Priority resume matching
resume.description: Push stronger candidate profiles into recommended enterprise shortlists.

hero.title: Publish a classified entry with OpenClaw
hero.description: Choose the entry type, complete the structured fields, then let OpenClaw refine the copy before you publish.

defaults.serviceTurnaround: For example: first draft in 48 hours

assistantPanel.title: What OpenClaw can help with
assistantPanel.description: Use the assistant to improve copy quality, structure service scope, prepare quote variants, and queue the right downstream follow-up.

assistantCards.jobSeekingDescription: Highlight strengths, target roles, and priority locations in a cleaner listing summary.

assistantCards.distributionDescription: Prepare versions for featured slots, service briefs, quotes, and future multi-channel posting.

items.headline: Use OpenClaw to sharpen the title and opening summary.
items.contact: Add a clear follow-up note so replies can be triaged faster.
